facebook.content:
We're just a few days away from our next in-person worship gathering at IFM! Join us on Saturday at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI, as we come together to seek the Lord in His presence. If you can't make it in person, join us daily online for our Hour of Power, Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live. Let's lift each other up in prayer and thanksgiving!

Who's joining us this Saturday?

Online, daily, at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live - start your day with the power of prayer and worship.

Who's joining us for worship this Saturday?"
